title: Sumerian/Akkadian: Maqlu Anti-Witchcraft Texts
description: From the Sumerian/Akkadian corpus: Maqlu Anti-Witchcraft Texts.
introduction: From the Sumerian/Akkadian corpus: Maqlu Anti-Witchcraft Texts.

translation.text: From 'Maqlu Anti-Witchcraft Texts': One of the 117 major literary works of ancient Mesopotamia, recorded on clay tablets in cuneiform script and preserved in the great libraries of Sumer, Akkad, Babylon, and Assyria.
